Assembly
California Legislature

COMMITTEES:
POLICY RESEARCH AND
MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE,
WAYS AND MEANS
JOINT LEGISLATIVE
BUDGET COMMITTEE,
JOINT COMMITTEE ON
THE 1992 QUINCENTENNIAL
JOINT COMMITTEE ON
SCHOOL FACILITIES
STATE ALLOCATION BOARD

ROBERT J. CAMPBELL
ASSEMBLYMAN, ELEVENTH DISTRICT

CHAIRMAN
WAYS & MEANS SUBCOMMITTEE CN EDUCATION

June 12, 1990

Mr. John Wallace
Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95804

FAX 916-327-2026

RE: Written Confirmation of
on a verbal opinion

Dear Mr. Wallace:

This letter is to request written confirmation of the verbal opinion
provided by you to Assemblymember Robert Campbell on June 5 and to
MariaTheresa Viramontes on June 8.

Is the cost for travel, accommodations and training expenses
associated with a three day staff retreat for state legislative
employees and district volunteers payable from a campaign account
a legitimate expenditure?

Can these expenditures be paid from the 1988-90 and or the 1990-92
campaign accounts?

The verbal opinion provided on June 5 determined that travel, accommodations
and training expenses are payable under either account as long as each
day is for governmental, legislative and or district business.

The expenditure reflects the execution of public trust as imposed
under Government Code section 85202 which states that campaign funds
can be used when these expenditures are directly related to a political,
legislative and governmental purpose.

Printed on Recycled Paper

John Wallace                          -2-                     June 12, 1990


The retreat is scheduled for July 19,20,21 of this year and a $320.00
dollar deposit needs to be made immediately to hold the space at Cranlibakken.
The retreat agenda shall include discussion and development of current
legislation for the district and state-wide issues, informational reports
of services in the district and capitol for the past and current year, to
identify district issues and advocacy strategy, staff training on
communication and conflict resolution and provide an informational overview
of the district for new staff and volunteers.

I would appreciate a written response sent to FAX 415-235-5059 by Monday,
June 25 so a check can be sent immediately to the retreat center.

Thank you for your consideration on this matter.

Sincerely,

[signature]
MariaTheresa Viramontes
District, Chief of Staff

CC: Eric Zell, Treasurer
    Jill Stecher, FPPC
    Susan Stuart, Capitol
    JoAnne Locher, Granlibskken

enc:  Government Code  85802 and 84211 section (j)  7
